feature_provenance.gnn_feats: 512-D real relative-geometry kNN edge features from SceneFun3D object boxes
feature_provenance.uni3d_feats: 1024-D real point/color/statistical object features from laser-scan PLY and annotation point indices; not pretrained Uni3D embeddings
feature_provenance.videofeats: 1024-D real RGB-D/camera statistical features from SceneFun3D image/depth frame coverage and annotation camera metadata; not pretrained video-network embeddings

scientific_caveat: These tensors are real SceneFun3D modality features but are not distribution-matched Uni3D/video embeddings used by the original 3DGraphLLM checkpoint.
